scripts.bootstrap: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/member-service && npm install --prefix services/job-service && npm install --prefix services/application-service && npm install --prefix services/messaging-service && npm install --prefix services/analytics-service && npm install --prefix services/connection-service
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:member-api" "npm run dev:member-worker" "npm run dev:connection-api" "npm run dev:job-api" "npm run dev:job-worker" "npm run dev:app-api" "npm run dev:app-worker" "npm run dev:msg-api" "npm run dev:msg-worker" "npm run dev:analytics-api" "npm run dev:analytics-worker"
